heading: Index De-Duplication
body:
The Performance Advisor de-duplicates overlapping indexes before it makes suggestions.
For example, consider if the Performance Advisor calculates the following potential
suggested indexes:

```json
{ a : 1 }
{ a : 1, b : 1 }
```

Since `{ a : 1 }` is a prefix of `{ a : 1, b : 1 }`, Performance Advisor
suggests only `{ a : 1, b : 1 }`. To learn more about index prefixes,
see [Prefixes](manual/core/index-compound).
